title: CategoryDisciplineAttribute
description:
CategoryDisciplineAttribute: Attribute that defines disciplines, to which a category belongs as defined in Visibility & Graphics window.
Allowed values of Disciplines property are: 'Architecture', 'Structure', 'Mechanical', 'Electrical', 'Piping' and 'Infrastructure'.
Each category added to Category needs to have CategoryDisciplineAttribute assigned to be successfully reflected.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
